channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Exercise timing and chronotype: How your body clock influences fitness benefits
item.description: The article explains how an individual’s chronotype—whether they are naturally inclined to be active in the morning, evening, or somewhere in between—can influence the benefits they gain from exercise...

item.title: House Oversight Committee Examines Role of Epstein's Assistant in Abuse Operations
item.description: The U.S. House Oversight Committee is investigating Sarah Kellen, a former assistant to Jeffrey Epstein, for her alleged role in facilitating Epstein's criminal activities. Serving as his assistant fr...

item.title: UK Health Secretary Wes Streeting resigns as Labour faces internal leadership pressure
item.description: The UK government is facing political turbulence as Labour Health Secretary Wes Streeting resigned, intensifying pressure on Prime Minister Keir Starmer. Streeting cited concerns that Starmer would no...

item.title: PE teacher banned indefinitely for inappropriate conduct with pupil
item.description: A physical education teacher, Stuart Smith, 48, from Mayville High School in Portsmouth, Hampshire, has been banned from teaching indefinitely after a disciplinary panel found he had engaged in an ina...

item.title: London prepares for large-scale protests with thousands of police deployed amid security concerns
item.description: Two significant protests are set to occur in London, prompting authorities to deploy over 4,000 police officers in what the Metropolitan Police describe as an unprecedented operation in recent years. ...

item.title: Young Filipinos actively register to vote ahead of May 18 deadline
item.description: In Valencia City, Bukidnon, young voters are showing strong participation in the lead-up to the May 18 voter registration deadline for the upcoming Barangay and Sangguniang Kabataan Elections (BSKE) t...

item.title: Governor Uba Sani praises Kaduna Polytechnic for promoting technical education and innovation

item.title: Ian McKellen Returns to Himself After Playing Falstaff
item.description: At 85 years old, renowned actor Ian McKellen undertook the iconic role of John Falstaff in a West End production of Shakespeare’s Henry IV, Parts I & II. To fully embody the character, McKellen allowe...

item.title: Primus release surprise EP ‘A Handful Of Nuggs’ featuring new track ‘The Ol’ Grizz’
item.description: American alternative rock band Primus have surprise-released a new four-track EP titled ‘A Handful Of Nuggs’. The release marks their first new material since the 2017 album ‘The Desaturating Seven’ a...

item.title: CBI arrests second NTA paper-setter in NEET-UG 2026 leak case, botany teacher from Pune held
item.description: In a major development in the NEET-UG 2026 question paper leak scandal, the CBI has arrested Manisha Gurunath Mandhare, a senior botany teacher from Pune who was appointed as an expert by the National...

item.title: Timeline ng umano’y insidente sa Senado at alegasyon ng pagtakas ni Sen. Bato
item.description: Ang artikulo ay tumutukoy sa isang ulat na naglalahad ng timeline ng isang kaguluhan sa loob ng Senado na umano’y nauwi sa insidente ng barilan at sa sinasabing pagtakas ni Senador Ronald “Bato” dela ...

item.title: Manchester City secure 1-0 FA Cup final victory over Chelsea with Semenyo's decisive goal
item.description: In a tightly contested English FA Cup final at Wembley Stadium, Manchester City claimed a 1-0 victory against Chelsea, thanks to a brilliant goal from Ghanaian midfielder Antoine Semenyo. The match, p...

item.title: 38-Year-Old Man Killed in Shark Attack off Western Australia
item.description: A 38-year-old man tragically lost his life in a shark attack off the coast of Western Australia on Saturday. The attack occurred at Horseshoe Reef, located northwest of Rottnest Island near Perth, and...

item.title: Orlando Pirates draw with Durban City, title race goes to final game
item.description: Orlando Pirates coach Abdeslam Ouaddou expressed his disappointment after his team could only manage a goalless draw against Durban City in their penultimate game of the Betway Premiership season. The...

item.title: James Cameron outlines plans for the final two Avatar films with reduced production time and costs
item.description: James Cameron has revealed his intention to streamline production for the final two films in the Avatar franchise. Speaking on The Empire Film Podcast while promoting his Billie Eilish tour documentar...

item.title: Nairobi Expressway Opens 15 Toll Attendant Positions for Diploma and Degree Holders
item.description: Moja Expressway, the company managing the Nairobi Expressway, has opened job applications for 15 toll attendant positions. Kenyan degree and diploma holders who meet the requirements are encouraged to...

item.title: Presumptive hantavirus case identified in one of four Canadians isolating after cruise ship outbreak
item.description: British Columbia's Provincial Health Officer, Dr. Bonnie Henry, announced on May 16, 2026, that one Canadian who had been isolating in the province has received a presumptive positive test result for ...

item.title: Federal budget tax reforms likely to reduce rental supply and affect Canberra property market
item.description: The recent federal budget has introduced significant changes to the taxation of property investments that are expected to have wide-ranging effects on the Canberra housing market and the ACT budget. N...

item.title: Mother speaks out after son sentenced for raping younger sibling in Pietermaritzburg
item.description: A mother from Pietermaritzburg has expressed deep feelings of personal failure after her 20-year-old son was sentenced to over 22 years in prison for raping his seven-year-old biological brother. The ...

item.title: Jessica Sanchez returns to the Araneta Coliseum for a live concert
